familyRules: Family-composition / eligibility rules not shown in rendered page content; page exposes an "Include someone else" option to add family members. Annual visit required. Time to passport (naturalisation) stated as 10 years. null pending interactive calculator.

routes.name: Equity investment
routes.notes: Residency-by-investment (RBI), not citizenship. EUR 50,000 in company share capital. CitizenX total cost shown as EUR 95,000 for a single applicant (difficulty: Moderate). Component breakdown (government fees, DD per adult, CitizenX service fee) not itemised in rendered page; the ~EUR 45,000 gap above the 50,000 equity covers fees but is not itemised. Family increments not shown.

routes.name: Bank deposit
routes.notes: EUR 280,000 in a Latvian bank. CitizenX total cost shown as EUR 340,000 for a single applicant (difficulty: Simple). Component breakdown (government fees, DD per adult, CitizenX service fee) not itemised in rendered page; the ~EUR 60,000 gap above the 280,000 deposit covers fees but is not itemised. Family increments not shown.

uncertain: /latvia/cost slug 404s; data taken from /residency/latvia and /latvia main programme pages.
Latvia is residency-by-investment (RBI), not citizenship; ~10 years to naturalisation.
Fee components (government fees, DD per adult, CitizenX service fee) not itemised; only the investment minimum and the CitizenX all-in single-applicant total are shown.
Family-composition increments and eligibility rules not shown.
Processing '4 weeks' is the official residency-permit estimate shown on the page.
